name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew build

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.repository == 'AuScope/NVCLAnalyticalServices' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew build
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Releases
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          gh release upload ${{ github.ref_name }} build/libs/NVCLAnalyticalServices-1.0.0.jar
output:
language: java
jdk:
- oraclejdk8
install: true
script:
  - ./gradlew build
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key:
    secure: 
  file: build/libs/NVCLAnalyticalServices-1.0.0.jar
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    repo: AuScope/NVCLAnalyticalServices
    tags: true

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  SECRET_1: 
  SECRET_2: 

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Import GPG keys
        run: |
          echo $GPG_SECRET_KEYS | base64 --decode | $GPG_EXECUTABLE --import
          echo $GPG_OWNERTRUST | base64 --decode | $GPG_EXECUTABLE --import-ownertrust
      - name: Build and test
        run: mvn test
      - name: Generate coverage report
        run: mvn -B jacoco:report coveralls:report

  deploy-master:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.repository == 'dhatim/safesql' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Deploy
        run: .deploy.sh

  deploy-tags:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.repository == 'dhatim/safesql' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Deploy
        run: .deploy.sh
output:
language: java
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
after_success:
  - mvn -B jacoco:report coveralls:report
before_install:
  - echo $GPG_SECRET_KEYS | base64 --decode | $GPG_EXECUTABLE --import
  - echo $GPG_OWNERTRUST | base64 --decode | $GPG_EXECUTABLE --import-ownertrust
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2
env:
  global:
    - secure: ""
    - secure: ""

deploy:
  - provider: script
    script: .deploy.sh
    on:
      repo: dhatim/safesql
      branch: master
      jdk: oraclejdk8
  - provider: script
    script: .deploy.sh
    on:
      repo: dhatim/safesql
      tags: true
      jdk: oraclejdk8

input:
name: Docker Build

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        FEDORA: [27, 28]
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Install
      run: |
        docker pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:${{ matrix.FEDORA }}
        docker run --name=container --detach -i -v $(pwd):/root/jss registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:${{ matrix.FEDORA }}
        docker exec container dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core gcc make rpm-build
        docker exec container dnf copr -y enable @pki/10.6
        docker exec container dnf builddep -y --spec /root/jss/jss.spec.in
        docker exec container /root/jss/build.sh --with-timestamp --with-commit-id rpm

    - name: Script
      run: docker exec container rpm -Uvh /root/build/jss/RPMS/*
output:
services:
  - docker

env:
  - FEDORA=27
  - FEDORA=28

install:
  - docker pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:$FEDORA
  - docker run
      --name=container
      --detach
      -i
      -v $(pwd):/root/jss
      registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:$FEDORA
  - docker exec container dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core gcc make rpm-build
  - docker exec container dnf copr -y enable @pki/10.6
  - docker exec container dnf builddep -y --spec /root/jss/jss.spec.in
  - docker exec container /root/jss/build.sh --with-timestamp --with-commit-id rpm

script:
  - docker exec container rpm -Uvh /root/build/jss/RPMS/*

input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.sonar/cache
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-sonar-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-sonar-

    - name: Build
      run: ./gradlew clean check sonarqube --info --stacktrace --warning-mode all

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
output:
dist: xenial
language: java
sudo: false

before_script:
  # Required for sonar to provide blame information
  - git fetch --unshallow

script:
  - ./gradlew clean check sonarqube --info --stacktrace --warning-mode all

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.sonar/cache/
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "kaklakariada-github"
    token:
      secure: "dJ6iIeeqovHdwmxyJJApMWchpupVwgGspbP8tjBE5I+lVkBj8sZm3QFd9s/WpQz/hTyAHyaQyP5QO5SSXP0DCQ4ROtbP8XcCjx8mHAZ7Q82cCa2LRiQp1C9MfriLzhSB7sddGnnkM6tU1+FGF21o0P00RD100DXG5oqQGTRyZB4="

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools" "platform-tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;26.0.2"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-23"
          sdkmanager "extras;android;m2repository"
          sdkmanager "extras;google;m2repository"
          sdkmanager "extras;google;google_play_services"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/android-sdk-dl
            ~/android-sdk
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
            ~/.android/build-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Check Gradle version
        run: ./gradlew --version
      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Build..."
          ./gradlew assembleDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false
      - name: Run tests
        run: ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false -q
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
output:
sudo: false
language: android

jdk: oraclejdk8

notifications:
  email: false



android:
    components:
      - tools
      - platform-tools
      - build-tools-26.0.2
      - android-23
      - extra-android-support
      - extra-android-m2repository
      - extra-google-m2repository
      - extra-android-m2repository
      - extra-google-google_play_services

before_cache:
  # Do not cache a few Gradle files/directories (see https://docs.travis-ci.com/user/languages/java/#Caching)
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    # Android SDK
    - $HOME/android-sdk-dl
    - $HOME/android-sdk

    # Gradle dependencies
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

    # Android build cache (see http://tools.android.com/tech-docs/build-cache)
    - $HOME/.android/build-cache

before_install:
  - ./gradlew --version


before_script:
  - echo '"Build..."' && echo -en 'travis_fold:start:script.build\\r'
  - ./gradlew assembleDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false
  - echo -en 'travis_fold:end:script.build\\r'

script:
  # skips predex on travis, takes too long, too much memory
  ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false -q

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches-ignore: [ gh-pages ]
  pull_request:
    branches-ignore: [ gh-pages ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 7
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'zulu'
        java-version: '7'

    - name: After success
      run: .utility/do-publish.sh

language: java
jdk: [ openjdk7 ]
branches:
  except:
    - gh-pages

input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Install Docker and docker-compose
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get -y -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confnew" install docker-ce curl
        sudo rm /usr/local/bin/docker-compose
        curl -L https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/${DOCKER_COMPOSE_VERSION}/docker-compose-$(uname -s)-$(uname -m) > docker-compose
        chmod +x docker-compose
        sudo mv docker-compose /usr/local/bin

    - name: Add hosts entry
      run: echo "127.0.0.1 proxy.cadc.dao.nrc.ca" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts

    - name: Build and test
      run: |
        gradle -i clean build test
        mkdir docker && cp Dockerfile docker/ && cp build/libs/*.war docker/ && docker build -t opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:SNAPSHOT -t opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:alpine -t opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:${VERSION} -f docker/Dockerfile docker/
        cd integrationTest
        docker-compose up -d
        docker ps -a
        docker-compose logs cadc-target-resolver.cadc.dao.nrc.ca
        docker-compose logs proxy.cadc.dao.nrc.ca
        curl -vL -d 'level=DEBUG' http://proxy.cadc.dao.nrc.ca/cadc-target-resolver/logControl
        gradle -i -b ../build.gradle -Dca.nrc.cadc.reg.client.RegistryClient.host=$REGISTRY_HOST clean intTest
        cd ../ && rm -rf docker

    - name: After success
      run: |
        if [ "$(. ./can-deploy.sh)" = "DEPLOY" ]; then echo "$DOCKER_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_USERNAME" --password-stdin; docker push opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:alpine; docker push opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:${VERSION}; fi
        if [ "$(. ./can-deploy.sh)" != "DEPLOY" ]; then echo "Not deploying."; fi
output:
language: java
jdk:
- oraclejdk8
sudo: required
services:
- docker
before_install:
- sudo apt-get update
- sudo apt-get -y -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confnew" install docker-ce curl
- sudo rm /usr/local/bin/docker-compose
- curl -L https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/${DOCKER_COMPOSE_VERSION}/docker-compose-`uname -s`-`uname -m` > docker-compose
- chmod +x docker-compose
- sudo mv docker-compose /usr/local/bin
script:
- gradle -i clean build test
- mkdir docker && cp Dockerfile docker/ && cp build/libs/*.war docker/ && docker build -t opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:SNAPSHOT -t opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:alpine -t opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:${VERSION} -f docker/Dockerfile docker/
- cd integrationTest
- docker-compose up -d
- docker ps -a
- docker-compose logs cadc-target-resolver.cadc.dao.nrc.ca
- docker-compose logs proxy.cadc.dao.nrc.ca
- curl -vL -d 'level=DEBUG' http://proxy.cadc.dao.nrc.ca/cadc-target-resolver/logControl
- gradle -i -b ../build.gradle -Dca.nrc.cadc.reg.client.RegistryClient.host=$REGISTRY_HOST clean intTest
- cd ../ && rm -rf docker
after_success:
- if [ "$(. ./can-deploy.sh)" = "DEPLOY" ]; then echo "$DOCKER_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_USERNAME" --password-stdin; docker push opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:alpine; docker push opencadc/cadc-target-resolver:${VERSION}; fi
- if [ "$(. ./can-deploy.sh)" != "DEPLOY" ]; then echo "Not deploying."; fi
addons:
  hosts: proxy.cadc.dao.nrc.ca
notifications:
  slack:
    secure:

  push:
    branches: [ devel ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ devel ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: [oraclejdk7, openjdk7]
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Before install

      with:
        distribution: 'zulu'
        java-version: '7'

    - name: Before deploy
      run: echo 'Starting deployment'

    - name: After deploy

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches-ignore:
      - gh-pages
  pull_request:
    branches-ignore:
      - gh-pages

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8

          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'

            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Build

input:
name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]*.[0-9]*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]*.[0-9]*'

jobs:
  test_jdk8:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Build
      run: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  test_jdk11:
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Build
      run: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  apollo_link_tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: 'lts/*'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Start Apollo tests server
      run: |
        cd vertx-web-graphql
        mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=io.vertx.ext.web.handler.graphql.ApolloTestsServer -Dexec.classpathScope=test > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log 2>&1 &
        echo $! > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid
        ( tail -f ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log & ) | grep -q "Apollo tests server started"
    - name: Run Apollo Link tests
      run: |
        cd tests/apollo
        npm install
        npm run test
    - name: Server log on failure
      if: failure()
      run: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log
    - name: Stop Apollo tests server
      if: always()
      run: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid | xargs kill -9
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  deploy_snapshots:
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' && env.SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME != ''
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Deploy to Sonatype snapshots
      run: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/
output:
language: java
branches:
  only:
  - master
  - /^\d+\.\d+$/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2
before_cache:
  - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/
jobs:
  include:
    - stage: test
      name: "OpenJDK 8"
      jdk: openjdk8
      script: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - if: type != pull_request
      name: "OpenJDK 11"
      jdk: openjdk11
      script: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - name: "Apollo Link tests"
      jdk: openjdk8
      before_script:
        - cd vertx-web-graphql
        - mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=io.vertx.ext.web.handler.graphql.ApolloTestsServer -Dexec.classpathScope=test > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log 2>&1 &
        - echo $! > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid
        - ( tail -f ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log & ) | grep -q "Apollo tests server started"
      script:
        - cd tests/apollo
        - npm install
        - npm run test
      after_failure: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log
      after_script: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid | xargs kill -9
    - stage: deploy
      name: "Deploy to Sonatype's snapshots repository"
      jdk: openjdk8
      if: type != pull_request AND env(SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME) IS present
      script: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh

on:
